<strong>Tafasitamab</strong> 目前有 <strong>23 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tafasitamab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Minjuvi is indicated in combination with lenalidomide followed by Minjuvi monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) who are not...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（98.7%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（97.3%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（95.4%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（94.5%）</li>
<li class="indication-matched">psoriasis（94.0%）<span class="indication-tag">📰 psoriasis</span></li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（93.0%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（93.0%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（92.9%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（92.7%）</li>
<li>pityriasis lichenoides（92.3%）</li>
<li>acne (disease)（89.6%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（89.3%）</li>
<li>ulcerative colitis (disease)（88.7%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis with juvenile macular dystrophy（88.6%）</li>
<li>neonatal dermatomyositis（88.1%）</li>
<li>parapsoriasis（88.0%）</li>
<li>amyopathic dermatomyositis（87.6%）</li>
<li>acrodermatitis chronica atrophicans（87.5%）</li>
<li>acne keloid（87.4%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（87.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
